name: NEEDY STREAMER OVERLOAD: Typing of The Net
developer: WSS playground, mumimumi, veryOK, Atree, kabocha renga
short_description: "NEEDY STREAMER OVERLOAD: Typing of The Net" is a typing game in which you enter internet lingo in a call-and-response format with a girl (OMGkawaiiAngel) who has a strong need for approval.
detailed_description:
NEEDY STREAMER OVERLOAD: Typing of The Net is a typing game where you enter internet lingo in a call-and-response format with a girl (OMGkawaiiAngel) who has a strong need for approval.
You play as a viewer, typing internet slang as your comments to respond, aiming for the top “S” rank!

A Flood of Internet Slang

All the keywords are internet slang, featuring over 200 phrases ranging from nostalgic classics to the latest trends.

Satisfying Challenge & Multiple Game Modes

  • LIVE Mode: Choose from three difficulties

  • Endless Mode: The longer you play, the harder it gets. A relentless challenge with no end

  • Worldwide Mode: Learn slang in Japanese and Simplified Chinese. Includes English explanations to help you discover global memes.

  • ENDLESS NIGHTMARE Mode：An internet nightmare may suddenly strike mid-play. What happens is for you to see…

Content Creation is Welcome!

Feel free to stream or upload gameplay videos. Please include the Steam store page URL for NEEDY STREAMER OVERLOAD: Typing of The Net in your description. Monetization is OK.
※If adding the URL is difficult, please mention the game during your stream instead.
